name: Brandied Cheddar Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind or process the cheese using the finest setting.
2. Combine the ground cheese with all other ingredients in a mixing bowl.
3. Mix well until fully incorporated.
4. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator.
5. Take the spread out of the refrigerator about 30 minutes before serving to allow it to soften for spreading.
6. A bourbon can be used as a substitute for brandy, yielding excellent results.
